visual_cues: Markor icon may not be visible

visual_cues: alphabetical grid of all installed apps

states.description: Markor Files tab listing markdown/text files in a directory
Markor text editor in edit mode
visual_cues: top bar with eye icon, save (floppy), search icons
pencil icon in top bar instead of eye icon
formatting toolbar with checkbox, @, +, star icons

states.description: More tab with app info, version, settings shortcut

visual_cues: checkboxes: Regex search, Case sensitive, Search in content
Stop search after first match (appears after enabling content search)
SEARCH / REPLACE button (bottom-left in editor context)
Search for and Replace with fields

states.description: Priority selection dialog for todo.txt items
visual_cues: radio list None, A, B, C, D, E, F
File settings, Share, Tools, Info, Reload, Settings
General, Other, Edit mode, View mode categories

states.description: Browse todo dialog with filter categories
visual_cues: Priority, Due date, Project, Context, Advanced filtering

states.description: Filter checkboxes for due date categories
visual_cues: Due in future, Due today, Overdue checkboxes

states.description: Multi-select mode in file browser after long-press
visual_cues: contextual action bar with star/AI(rename)/info/trash icons

states.description: Confirm Delete dialog listing selected paths
Shrug emoticon dialog indicating empty result/folder
Accidentally opened Broccoli recipe app due to similar green tree icon

strategies.name: CREATE_FOLDER_AND_FILE
steps: replace default name with desired filename
select Type if needed (Plain Text for .txt)
click(OK) to create and open file
strategies.success_signal: Editor opens with target filename in top bar
strategies.fallback: If existing name conflicts (file not overwritten), choose a different unique name

strategies.name: EDIT_AND_SAVE_NOTE
steps: long_press text to bring up selection menu and click 'Select all' if clearing existing content
type the new markdown content (use **bold**, - [ ] checkbox, # header, - bullet)
strategies.success_signal: save icon becomes greyed out indicating no unsaved changes
strategies.fallback: If formatting toolbar buttons split content across lines, clear and type raw markdown directly

strategies.name: SEARCH_REPLACE_IN_FILE
steps: click(SEARCH / REPLACE) to open full dialog
click 'Search for' and type pattern (escape brackets if Regex on)
strategies.fallback: If Matches=0, verify Regex setting matches pattern; ensure target text exists in file

strategies.name: SEARCH_FILES_IN_DIRECTORY
steps: type search term in Search field
toggle 'Regex search', 'Case sensitive', 'Search in content' as required
if needed, enable 'Stop search after first match' (visible after Search in content enabled)
strategies.success_signal: Filtered results shown or shrug dialog indicates none found
strategies.fallback: Press system Back if a stray Select dialog appears; reopen search and retry

strategies.name: ADD_TODO_TASK
steps: tap blank area to focus editor
OPTION A: type the full todo.txt line directly e.g. '(A) Task desc +project @context'
OPTION B: use toolbar (star for priority, @ for context, + for project) being careful that they may insert on new line
strategies.success_signal: Syntax highlighting applied; save icon greys out
strategies.fallback: If toolbar splits across lines, long_press + Select all + delete, then type the raw todo.txt line manually

strategies.name: MARK_TODO_COMPLETE
strategies.preconditions: cursor on task line in todo_tab edit mode
steps: tap on the task line text to position cursor
click checkbox icon in formatting toolbar
strategies.success_signal: Line prefixed with 'x YYYY-MM-DD' and shown with strikethrough
strategies.fallback: Re-position cursor explicitly before tapping the checkbox icon

strategies.name: TOGGLE_PREVIEW
steps: click(pencil_icon) to return to edit mode
strategies.success_signal: Rendered markdown displayed; toolbar icon toggles between eye and pencil

strategies.name: DELETE_FILES_BY_PATTERN
steps: click each additional matching file to add to selection
scroll to verify no more matches
strategies.success_signal: Selected files no longer in list
strategies.fallback: If search dialog gives empty results, fall back to visually scanning list and multi-selecting

strategies.name: CONFIGURE_STARTUP
steps: click(App start tab) and choose desired tab
click(App start folder) and choose folder

strategies.name: RENAME_FILE
steps: long_press the text field then click 'Select all'
strategies.success_signal: File appears under new name in list
strategies.fallback: If new name was prepended instead of replaced, cancel and reopen, then explicitly select all before typing

dead_ends.failed_action: click(green tree icon on home screen)
dead_ends.note: Broccoli recipe app has a similar green tree icon; always confirm app from app drawer instead

dead_ends.failed_action: search for 'Browse by context' or 'Find and Replace' under Tools
dead_ends.note: Tools submenu contains only 'Speed Read'; advanced filters live elsewhere (title bar tap in view mode for Browse todo; search icon for Find/Replace)
Often because Regex is on but pattern uses unescaped brackets, or target text not in document; ensure file content matches and regex flag is correct

dead_ends.failed_action: click OK while empty/kaomoji background visible
dead_ends.note: OK click can pass through to background triggering Select dialog; use keyboard Enter or back out and retry

dead_ends.failed_action: use toolbar checkbox/star/bold after typing text
dead_ends.note: Toolbar buttons often insert formatting on a NEW line, splitting tasks; insert formatting FIRST or type raw markdown/todo.txt directly

dead_ends.failed_action: click OK without changing default name
dead_ends.note: If 'my_note.md' already exists, creation silently fails ('Files and folders are not overwritten'); pick unique name

dead_ends.failed_action: App paused due to Digital Wellbeing timer
dead_ends.note: Resolve by deleting the App timer in Settings before launching

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
categories.precondition: Device home screen or unrelated app is active
abstract_steps: Verify target app identity before launching (icon ambiguity is common)
Open the all-apps drawer if the target app is not pinned
Launch the target app and wait for splash to settle
Use the bottom navigation or top menu to reach the desired section
failure_modes: Launching a visually similar but different app
Acting on splash screen before UI is interactive
Assuming a feature exists under a menu that only holds unrelated entries
verification_checklist: App title/header matches the intended app
The active tab/section indicator highlights the target screen
Expected screen-specific controls are visible

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Application is at the list/editor where new entries can be created
abstract_steps: Trigger the create action (FAB or compose control)
Provide required fields (name, type, content) replacing defaults explicitly
Confirm creation and verify the new entry exists or is opened
failure_modes: Default placeholder name conflicts with an existing entry causing silent failure
Typing without first replacing the default leads to concatenated values
Selecting the wrong creation variant (file vs folder, regular vs quick)
verification_checklist: New entry appears in the list or opens in an editor
Entry name and type match the request
No duplicate-name error dialogs are present

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target entry is opened in an editor
abstract_steps: If replacing content, select all existing content and delete it
Insert formatting markers BEFORE typing text where toolbar buttons may misbehave
Type the new content using the underlying markup directly when toolbar buttons split across lines
Persist changes via the save control
failure_modes: Toolbar formatting buttons insert on new line, splitting the intended single-line entry
Autocorrect/auto-list continuation causes duplicated prefixes
Saving forgotten, leaving unsaved-changes indicator active
verification_checklist: Rendered/raw content matches the requested formatting
Save indicator returns to a neutral state (e.g., disabled/greyed)
Reopening the entry shows the persisted content

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: List view showing the target entries
abstract_steps: Enter multi-select mode via long-press on a target
Tap each additional matching item to add to selection
Scroll to confirm no further matches are hidden below the fold
Invoke delete and confirm in the dialog
failure_modes: Missing items hidden by scroll
Accidentally selecting non-matching items
Dismissing the confirmation dialog instead of confirming
verification_checklist: Target items no longer appear in the list
No remaining items match the deletion criterion
No error toast displayed

categories.name: RENAME_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Entry is selectable in a list
abstract_steps: Select the entry to expose contextual actions
Open the rename control
Explicitly select-all current text before typing the new name
Confirm the rename
failure_modes: New text is prepended/appended because old text was not fully selected
Forgetting required file extension
verification_checklist: Entry now displays the exact new name including extension
No conflict dialog appears

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
abstract_steps: Navigate to the screen most likely to display the requested metadata
Read the displayed value verbatim
Return the answer in the requested format
failure_modes: Opening the entry instead of reading list-level metadata
Confusing similar-looking fields
verification_checklist: The text shown matches the requested field
Answer formatting matches the prompt's expectation

categories.name: SEARCH_OR_FILTER
categories.precondition: On a screen that exposes a search/filter affordance
abstract_steps: Open the search/filter dialog
Enter the query string
Toggle option flags (case sensitivity, regex, scope, stop-after-first) as required
Note that some options only appear once a parent option is enabled
Execute the search and inspect results
failure_modes: Treating regex metacharacters as literals (or vice versa) due to wrong flag state
Submit gestures passing through dialog to background triggering unexpected popups
Required option hidden behind a parent toggle
verification_checklist: Query and option flags reflect the request
Match count or filtered list confirms expected scope
Empty-result indicator distinguishes 'no match' from dialog dismissal

categories.name: FIND_AND_REPLACE
categories.precondition: Entry is open in an editor that supports find/replace
abstract_steps: Open the search dialog and transition to the replace variant if separate
Enter the find pattern and replacement string in their respective fields
Configure regex/multiline flags as required, escaping characters appropriately
Verify a positive match count before executing
Execute replace-all and inspect the document
failure_modes: Match count remains zero because of regex flag mismatch or empty target
Dialog closes unexpectedly due to misplaced taps; pattern is typed into the document instead
verification_checklist: Replacement is visible in the rendered/raw content
No occurrences of the original pattern remain (for replace-all)
Document saved if persistence is required

categories.name: CONFIGURE_SETTINGS
abstract_steps: Open the overflow/options menu and enter Settings
Drill into the appropriate category
Select the setting and choose the desired value from the dialog
failure_modes: Looking for the setting under an unrelated category
Closing the dialog without selecting
verification_checklist: Updated value displayed beneath the setting name
Behavior change observed on next relevant action/launch

categories.name: TOGGLE_VIEW_MODE
categories.precondition: Entry is open in an editor that has edit/preview modes
abstract_steps: Tap the mode-toggle control
Confirm the alternate icon appears indicating the new mode
failure_modes: Misidentifying the mode toggle among toolbar icons
verification_checklist: Rendered content is visible when in preview
Toggle icon now offers the inverse action
